text:
@cs188

Amazing work for 27h from debate start to publishing date. I see you wanted to upload on the 23rd anniversary, but couldn't make it. 
For the time given, it's amazing work, but let me ignore that for the moment, and give it a review:
- The style got reused a few times now, what with the three presidential debates. The nonsensical rulemaking at the start felt entirely expected, tho the lewd jokes were a great sequence.
- It felt rushed. The 6 1/2h later sign after Trump and Harris arrived was cut short and they start speaking already - chill! You got 90 minutes to speak, folks!
- The main focus of the video were the 9/11 jokes, they were made twice in this barely 5 min video, inc. the ending, which was a callback... It doesn't really fit your style. Not much for a regular joke, but I suppose it's still quite a serious topic in US, so it was quite edgy.
- A lot of amazing jokes, like the 'raisin' joke and the 'MAMA campaign' sequence. They just didn't fit well, is all.

For the time given, a solid, certified cs188 brand of funny nonsense to raise our spirits. Otherwise, a little haphazardly put together.

Keep the vibes up, our friendly neighbourhood Rainbow Lazar Squirrel!
